ms_credentials.title: Microsoft Account — App Credentials
ms_credentials.description: Enter the Client ID and Client Secret from your Entra App Registration.

ms_auth_url.title: Microsoft Account — Authorize
ms_auth_url.description:
Click the link below to sign in with your personal Microsoft account and grant Contacts access. After authorization you will be redirected back to Home Assistant automatically.

[Authorize Microsoft Account]({auth_url})

google_credentials.title: Google Account — App Credentials
google_credentials.description: Enter the Client ID and Client Secret from your Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 Desktop client.

google_auth_url.title: Google Account — Authorize
google_auth_url.description: A browser window will open for you to sign in with your Google account and grant Contacts access. After authorization you will be redirected back to Home Assistant automatically.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authorize Google Account
reauth_confirm.description: Your Google authorization has expired or been revoked. Click Submit to sign in again with your Google account and restore contact sync.

error.ms_auth_failed: Microsoft authorization failed. Check your client credentials and try again.
error.google_auth_failed: Google authorization failed. Check your client credentials and the authorization code.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check your credentials and network connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.ms_auth_timeout: Microsoft authorization timed out. Please restart the setup.

data.delete_removed: Delete Outlook contacts when removed from Google
data.auto_remove_duplicates: Auto-remove duplicate Outlook contacts during sync (matched by name — destructive)

sync_now.name: Sync Now
sync_now.description: Trigger an immediate contacts delta sync.

full_sync.name: Full Resync
full_sync.description: Run a full reconciliation: adopt existing Outlook contacts by name, fix drift, and reset the delta token.
